label: Companion bond
summary: Rivers can trust a captured creature as a partner.

label: Capture pods
summary: Pods can settle a wild creature into the party.

label: Ashcat trail
summary: Ashcat is quick, fiery, and loyal once chosen.

label: Mireling trail
summary: Mireling reads puddles, mud, and shorelines well.

label: Bramble Imp trail
summary: Bramble Imp knows how to hide in tangled woods.

label: Wild signs
summary: Rustling grass and odd tracks can mark an encounter zone.

label: Orchard fruit
summary: Riverside fruit can restore a wounded companion.

label: Greenwood watch
summary: The road watcher tracks who can safely pass the forest.

label: Highridge proof
summary: The first region master yields when Rivers proves courage.

label: Lakehaven proof
summary: The lake master respects patience and control.

label: Frostvale proof
summary: The frost master tests whether Rivers can keep moving.

label: Dreadpeak proof
summary: The peak master guards the road to the dragon.

label: Lake delivery
summary: A small errand can open trust in Lakehaven.

label: Cold hands
summary: Cold-weather keepers reward careful catching.

label: Torch path
summary: Dreadpeak torches reveal where the cave is safest.

label: Last light
summary: The river approach is the final quiet stop before danger.

label: Green dragon proof
summary: The final victory proves Rivers has solved the larger mystery.

label: Battle ready
summary: A rival fight checks whether Rivers understands timing.

label: Safe house
summary: Home is the place to recover before the road.

label: Water edge
summary: Lake and river paths hide different creatures than grass.

label: Forest cover
summary: Trees can hide paths, people, and wild movement.

label: Cave shadow
summary: Dark routes need landmarks and patience.

label: Fire type
summary: Fire creatures hit hard and punish fragile targets.

label: Water type
summary: Water creatures wear opponents down steadily.

label: Wild type
summary: Wild creatures use grass, vines, and sudden movement.

label: Frost type
summary: Frost creatures slow a fight and punish mistakes.

label: Stone type
summary: Stone creatures trade speed for durability.

label: Shrine stones
summary: Four stones at the shrine, one for each warden. A fifth was carved once; carved again after the dragon sat down.
